title: Bump release to 5.8.0
body:
@Honny1 @lsm5  ptal

I updated the `.packit.yml` file with a post hook. The reason is that the fmf needs to be fetched from github **only** downstream. if fetched upstream before any release is created the tag won't exist yet and the automation will fail.

comments.body: The 2 running packit jobs are actually done. Just the final status reporting issue in packit that's seen sometimes. Can't find the related packit issue atm. Good to merge.

I don't have merge rights here fwiw.

EDIT: I think I do, just that the 2 jobs are `Required` . We could trigger the entire set of jobs again as  I don't think `retest-failed` would work here.

Also, I suggest not having epel jobs as required as they could fail often due to slower toolchain updates.
